values: The tanner is out of materials and the whole craft line has stalled
The hunters came back empty-handed three days running. We need help
There are orders for leather goods that cannot be filled without fresh hides
The fletcher has no feathers and the guard captain has no patience
Winter clothing needs to be repaired and there is nothing to repair it with
The bone carver has commissions backed up but no raw materials to work with
Something spooked the game and the usual hunting grounds are empty
We use every part of the animal. Right now we have no animals
The trapper's lines have been cut and nobody knows by whom
An expedition needs supplies that only come from the wild
The hunters refuse to go near the old woods. Something changed out there
The stockpile for the coming expedition is woefully short
Armor repairs are piling up and the craftsmen need raw materials
The apothecary uses parts I would rather not think about. But the work is necessary
We had a surplus last season. This season the land has been less generous
